philosophers_prep.title: Research the Philosopher's Stone recipe (Divine/PTD mod — requires the Path to Divinity scroll first)

subtitle.text: This quest does not tell you where the scroll is. If you want it, you will find it.

description: The Path to Divinity scroll is hidden.
It is not in a standard loot pool.
The Philosopher's Stone (Divine/PTD mod) is what it leads to.
The Philosopher's Stone requires the Mass Accumulate mechanic:
999 villager souls accumulated through the Mass Accumulate ritual.
The Philosopher's Stone in Fullmetal Alchemist is made from human souls.
It amplifies alchemy beyond natural limits.
The cost is souls. The gain is transcendence.
Whether this trade is worth making is left to the player.
The Path to Divinity is the dark path.
It is not required for Ch17.
→ Find the hidden Path to Divinity scroll [check]
